scoring_rationale: Feeds both credit decisioning and regulatory capital (IRB); moderate complexity (interpretable scorecard);decisions are largely automated below a referral threshold; data is internal bureau/application data, well governed.

scoring_rationale: Directly drives loss provisioning and regulatory capital; moderate-high complexity due to segment-specific recovery curves; used as a strong input but with analyst overlay; recovery data is sparse and judgmental.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (reduced benchmarking scope permitted)

model_name: Market Risk VaR Model (Equity/FX Trading Book)
scoring_rationale: Directly determines regulatory trading capital requirements; moderate complexity; fully automated daily capital calculation with no human override; relies on well-governed internal trade and price data.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (conceptual soundness, outcome analysis, benchmarking, sensitivity testing)

model_name: IFRS 9 / CECL Expected Credit Loss Model
model_type: PD x LGD x EAD lifetime ECL engine
scoring_rationale: Directly drives the loan loss allowance on the balance sheet and reported earnings; high complexity (multiple sub-models combined with macro scenario overlays); output flows almost automatically into financial statements; depends on forward-looking macro data with inherent uncertainty.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (conceptual soundness, outcome analysis, benchmarking, sensitivity testing)

scoring_rationale: False negatives carry severe regulatory and reputational consequences (sanctions, fines); hybrid rules/ML complexity; alerts drive investigation decisions with analyst review (not fully automated); depends on noisy, high-volume, frequently-changing transaction data.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (conceptual soundness, outcome analysis, benchmarking, sensitivity testing)

scoring_rationale: Direct customer and financial impact from false positives/negatives; high complexity (black-box gradient boosting, hard to explain individual declines); near-real-time automated decisioning with minimal human override; depends on fast-evolving fraud patterns and third-party data feeds.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (conceptual soundness, outcome analysis, benchmarking, sensitivity testing)

model_name: CCAR / Stress Testing Credit Loss Model
scoring_rationale: Directly informs capital planning and is subject to direct regulatory/supervisory scrutiny (CCAR); high complexity due to macro scenario linkage; results heavily inform but do not single-handedly determine capital actions; relies on macro data with structural uncertainty over stress horizons.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (conceptual soundness, outcome analysis, benchmarking, sensitivity testing)

model_name: Interest Rate Risk in the Banking Book (IRRBB) Model
scoring_rationale: Informs balance sheet hedging and capital adequacy assessment; moderate complexity (behavioral assumptions on non-maturity deposits); used as a key input to ALCO decisions with committee judgment; data is internal balance sheet data, well governed.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (reduced benchmarking scope permitted)

model_type: Cash flow runoff model under stress scenarios
scoring_rationale: Directly informs the bank's liquidity buffer and contingency funding plan; moderate complexity (runoff assumptions by deposit/funding type); informs ALCO decisions with judgment overlay; internal funding data, well governed.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (reduced benchmarking scope permitted)

scoring_rationale: Contributes to regulatory capital but typically a smaller capital component than credit/market risk; high complexity (statistical loss distribution modeling, scenario blending); informs capital calculation with significant expert judgment overlay; relies on sparse internal loss data plus subjective scenario inputs.
validation_depth: Full independent validation (reduced benchmarking scope permitted)

scoring_rationale: Directly determines trade valuation and daily P&L; moderate complexity (standard curve-based pricing, well-established methodology); fully automated valuation with no manual override in normal conditions; relies on well-governed, actively quoted market data.

scoring_rationale: Limited direct financial impact (informs retention marketing spend only); moderately high complexity (ensemble model, not easily interpretable;) used as one input among several in campaign targeting, with marketing judgment applied; relies on internal CRM data of moderate quality.

scoring_rationale: Informs internal capital allocation and risk appetite, but is an internal management tool rather than a primary regulatory capital driver; high complexity (aggregates credit/market/operational risk with correlation assumptions); used as a key input to capital planning discussions with senior management judgment; depends on outputs of multiple upstream models, compounding data risk.

scoring_rationale: Financial impact is real but bounded by position limits and kill-switches; moderate complexity (deterministic execution rules, not statistical/ML); fully automated execution with no per-trade human override; relies on well-governed real-time market data feeds.

scoring_rationale: Direct impact on individual client portfolios, but limited to retail wealth clients rather than balance-sheet-wide exposure; low-moderate complexity (standard mean-variance optimization, well-documented methodology); largely automated rebalancing with limited advisor override; relies on internal client questionnaire and market data, both reasonably well governed.

model_type: Rules-based cost allocation across business units
